Typedef Documentation

typedef struct mw_venc_amd_opengl_param mw_venc_amd_opengl_param_t

#include <mw_venc_common_ex.h>

mw_venc_amd_opengl_param_t

Defines AMD OpenGL parameters.
Related types:
mw_venc_param_ex_t
Related function(s):
mw_venc_create_ex

typedef struct mw_venc_param_ex mw_venc_param_ex_t

#include <mw_venc_common_ex.h>

mw_venc_param_ex_t

Defines the extended parameters of encoder to support OpenGL texture.
Related type(s):
mw_venc_param_t
mw_venc_amd_opengl_param_t
